title: Alchemical Italy
subtitle: Courts, universities, and the Hermetic revival

narrative.intro: From Salerno and the scholastic faculties to Ficino's Florence and the print shops of Venice — Italy is where alchemy met humanism.
narrative.provenance_note: Region = 'Italy' (83 events). Events from the ALCHEMYTIMELINEMAP corpus (largely draft-status); locations are event geocodes, not residences. Absence on this map reflects gaps in the record.
narrative.design_note: Illuminated Manuscript: Medici patronage, humanist manuscripts, gilded court culture — Italy's alchemy arrived dressed like this.
